title: Structures Rebalanced
description: Adds new structures to try to fill the gaps left by Vanilla structures, and refreshes some existing ones.
body:
[!["Minecraft Rebalanced" Collection by RainlessSky](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Rebalanced-2A2B2F?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&label=part%20of&labelColor=222329)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rWTOiG2z)  
Structures Rebalanced's goal is to increase the variety of structures, filling up empty biomes and refreshing existing ones. **This is incomplete, anything is subject to change.**

Structures will only generate in chunks generated when the data pack is enabled.

## Structures
Structures Rebalanced adds 10 new structures to various biomes and refreshes one. Below is a list of all structures, a short description of the structure, and what biomes it spawns in (if applicable).
<details>
<summary>warning: spoilers!</summary>

### Surface Mineshaft
A new, detailed mineshaft with an entry from the surface. Features plenty of spawners.
<details><summary>Details</summary>

![A surface mineshaft entrance on the surface.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OUUpCD5M/images/8d60a173202c7624c896b4e6732d5d9ea44e83e4.png)

Valid spawn biomes:
Plains,
Forest,
Flower Forest,
Birch Forest,
Taiga,
Old Growth Spruce Taiga,
Savanna
</details>

### Desert Tomb
Maze-like sandstone corridors featuring: puzzles, traps, and a lot of spawners.
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

![A desert tomb entrance on the surface.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OUUpCD5M/images/814d5b8123260daa6e8ed846c3a7cf4ab6d0e313.png)

Valid spawn biomes:
read the structure name
</details>

### Mud Ruin
A ruined village in the style of vanilla's Trail Ruins.
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

![The interior of a mud ruin building.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OUUpCD5M/images/9ece3e1a355a1f5c652d87546d74a73d4ede73e1.png)
  
Valid spawn biomes:
Jungle,
Sparse Jungle,
Old Growth Birch Forest,
Taiga,
Old Growth Spruce Taiga
</details>

### Conquered Stronghold
A variant of stronghold conquered by Illagers. This does not replace vanilla's strongholds.
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

![A conquered stronghold entrance on the surface.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OUUpCD5M/images/b28672dc7943880bc5c31f8ee9a10f0acbac2494.png)

Valid spawn biomes:
Plains,
Savanna
</details>

### Crypt
A vanilla-esque 5 room dungeon with pots & chests.
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
Valid spawn biomes:
All biomes, only generates in the stone layer
</details>

### Deepslate/Sculk Dungeon
Similar to a vanilla dungeon, but specialized for the deepslate layer. There is a sculk variant for the Deep Dark.
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
Valid spawn biomes:
All biomes
</details>

### Big Mushroom
Mushroom. Contains Mush and Room.
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
Valid spawn biomes:
Swamp, Dark Forest
</details>

### Overgrown Dungeon
Extremely mossy corridors with plenty of traps.
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

![A room in an overgrown dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OUUpCD5M/images/981e27ecdab4493d3bb0f3f1ca27a033d453409b.png)
  
Valid spawn biomes:
Jungles
</details>

### Pillager Outpost (refresh)
Pillager Outpost is now a floor taller & contains furniture. A special surprise stands at the highest floor. This replaces the vanilla Pillager Outpost.
<details>
 <summary>Details</summary>

![A refreshed Pillager Outpost in a desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OUUpCD5M/images/f5a8b2de8a79341f6a71ab3cade61343745c304e.png)
  
</details>

### Badlands Trading Post
Singular building with two villagers.
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
  
Valid spawn biome:
Badlands
</details>

### Cobblestone Ruin
A couple of ruins from who knows when.
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
Valid spawn biome:
Plains, Sunflower Plains, Meadow, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Old Growth Birch Forest, Jungle, Sparse Jungle, Windswept Hills, Windswept Forest, Dark Forest (aka Dark Oak Forest), Swamp, Savanna
</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>KNOWN ISSUES</summary>
- A Surface Mineshaft "ladder" template has missing chest loot
</details>

## Advancements Addon
The advancements addon adds advancements **for Structures Rebalanced's added structures**. If you have advancement suggestions, post them in the Discord server!
